q: According to the Associated Press (AP) on March 25, 2026, the U.S. Justice Department agreed to a $1.2 million settlement to resolve a 'malicious prosecution' lawsuit filed by which former National Security Adviser?

In a Science News update from March 25, 2026, researchers confirmed that a car-sized asteroid designated '2026 FM3' safely passed Earth at a distance closer than what landmark?
As reported by Grist and other partners on March 25, 2026, the U.S. administration is paying French energy firm TotalEnergies nearly $1 billion to halt the construction of what in the Atlantic Ocean?
On March 25, 2026, Variety reported that which late-night host is developing a new 'Lord of the Rings' film with his son at Warner Bros.?
Which Marvel actor recently called out Sony and Disney to 'get their s—t together' regarding rights so his character can fight Spider-Man, as reported by Variety on March 25, 2026?
According to a TMZ report on March 25, 2026, which 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' star was tragically found dead by a friend, with no foul play suspected?
